title: Breakwave Dry Bulk Shipping Report 2.4.2025
summary:
Main
in Weekly Shipbuilding Reports 04/02/2025
Optimism Drives Futures Higher As Spot Remains Dormant - The recent uptick in optimism regarding a sharp recovery in spot
Source: Breakwave Advisors

Linked asset: 2025-02-04_BreakwaveDryFebruary42025Report.pdf
Source asset: reports/hellenic/shipbuilding/pdfs/2025-02-04_BreakwaveDryFebruary42025Report.pdf

[Page 1]
BDRY
Dry Bulk Shipping
February 4, 2025
Breakwave Dry Futures Index: 1,108 Baltic Dry Index (spot): 738 Short-term Indicators:
↑ 30D: 5.1% ↓ 30D: -31.2% Momentum: Positive
↑ YTD: 9.2% ↓ YTD: -26.0% Sentiment: Neutral
↓ YOY: -31.7% ↓ YOY: -47.5% Fundamentals: Neutral
Bi-Weekly Report
• Optimism Drives Futures Higher As Spot Remains Dormant - The recent uptick in optimism regarding a sharp recovery
in spot rates has led to a rise in the futures curve over the past week. This shift is driven by expectations that the dry
bulk market will move past the typically slow Chinese New Year holidays and experience a surge in activity. However,
there is limited evidence thus far to suggest an imminent recovery.
